## What this changes

A short summary of the change and the motivation.

Closes #<issue> <!-- if applicable -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally (CI runs it on Python 3.10 and 3.11)
- [ ] New behavior has tests (synthetic fixture for diagnostics / M&V)
- [ ] Diagnostics are written against `Role`s, not BAS-specific tag names
- [ ] Methods cite a public standard; no proprietary code or text is included
- [ ] No new runtime dependency (or it's discussed in the issue)
- [ ] Docstrings/comments explain non-obvious logic
- [ ] No real-building data added to the repo or tests

## Notes for reviewers

Anything worth calling out — design choices, trade-offs, follow-ups.
